overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a long coat and hat exploring a stormy waterfront industrial area. The character walks from a wooden shack down to a muddy shoreline, follows the water to a dock, then turns and walks toward an industrial complex featuring a steam train.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy slope to muddy shoreline as character descends to the water

agents.ego_description: walking down the grassy slope from the wooden shack toward the muddy shore, moving away from the building

entered.detail: small weathered wooden building elevated on stilts with external staircase
steep green grass embankment leading down to the water
broken wooden posts sticking out of the ground along the path
wet muddy beach area with scattered debris and driftwood
hazy mountain range visible across the water under storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a weathered wooden shack on stilts as the character descends a grassy slope toward a stormy waterfront. The ground transitions from grass to muddy shoreline as the character approaches the water's edge, with distant mountains visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy waterfront shoreline with stone embankment

events.description: character stops walking at the water's edge and turns around to face back toward the shore

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy shoreline toward the wooden dock structure, following the water's edge

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier with vertical pilings extending into the water
irregular stone slabs forming a path along the muddy shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the muddy shoreline toward a wooden dock structure, with the water on the left and industrial buildings visible in the distant background. The path follows a stone embankment until the character stops at the water's edge and turns around.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy bank between shore and industrial buildings

events.description: ground surface transitions from muddy shore back to grassy terrain as character ascends the bank

agents.ego_description: walking back along the shore and ascending the grassy bank toward the industrial warehouse area, passing the wooden shack again

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with multiple windows and weathered facade
covered wooden platform structure with gabled roof
vertical wooden pilings holding back the embankment

segments.scene_description: The character returns along the shoreline, passing back by the wooden shack which now appears on the left, and transitions from the muddy shore onto a grassy bank. An industrial warehouse and train station canopy become visible ahead as the character approaches the industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dockyard with train station and steam locomotive

events.description: steam locomotive emitting black smoke comes into view parked at the platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the industrial building and the stationary steam train, walking along the dirt path beside the retaining wall

notable_agents.action: stationary steam locomotive emitting thick black smoke, parked at the train platform

entered.detail: black steam train with red trim emitting smoke from its stack
large multi-story brick factory building with tall chimneys
tall industrial chimneys rising behind the main building

segments.scene_description: The character enters the industrial dockyard area, approaching a large brick industrial building with prominent smokestacks. A stationary steam locomotive comes into view on the left, emitting black smoke as it sits at the platform. The wooden retaining wall lines the right side of the path as the character moves deeper into the industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, stormy shoreline toward a bustling industrial dockyard. It begins by descending a grassy slope past a weathered wooden shack on stilts, where the terrain shifts into a muddy shoreline with distant mountains visible through the haze. As the character follows the water's edge along a stone embankment toward a wooden dock, the camera tracks the movement before turning back to retrace the path. The scene then transitions from the mud back onto a grassy bank, opening up to reveal a warehouse and station canopy in the distance. Finally, the camera moves deep into the industrial zone, passing a wooden retaining wall toward a large brick building and a stationary steam locomotive emitting thick black smoke.
